mnemonics: C.L.A.S.S. Divergences: Remember the types of language divergences by classifying them into Conceptual, Lexical, Anisomorphism, Structural, and Syntactic/Semantic categories.
keyPoints: Words don't have direct one-to-one translations (Lexical Divergence).
Grammatical structures vary significantly across languages (Structural Divergence).
commonMistakes: Assuming a direct word-for-word translation is possible.
Overlooking the deep structural differences between languages.
Applying the grammatical rules of one's native language to the target language.
